## Operator-facing changes

<!--
Required for changes to: Make targets, Vault paths, env vars,
NetworkPolicy templates, charts, runbooks, CI gates, secret
schemas, branch-protection rules, anything visible to operators
or SREs.

Add an entry under [Unreleased] in CHANGELOG.md and link the
section here.

If this PR has NO operator-facing changes (pure refactor, internal
test, comment-only), state: "None — internal-only change."

The advisory CI check at scripts/check_changelog_updated.py
warns when an operator-facing path is touched without a
CHANGELOG.md update.
-->
